Weighted Blend
0.4 * base + 0.6 * rule_score
Rule override dominates

C-502 POST_VOID_ALERT
C-602 GIFT_CARD_DRAIN
C-D02 DISPUTE_LOST

C-102 CASH_VARIANCE
